case_title: SANDRO TUZZO VS. ARTHINE COSSEY VAN DUYNE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-12-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $6,689.06 AS TO DEFENDANT VAN DUYNE, ARTHINE COSSEY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TUZZO, SANDRO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAN DUYNE, ARTHINE COSSEY $6,273.00 PRINCIPAL, $159.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,432.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
